turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, I want to know if HDFC ERGO health insurance is accepted at your clinic.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hello! Yes, HDFC ERGO is one of the insurers we're tied up with. Both cashless and reimbursement claims are supported.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: I want to go the cashless route. My procedure is a knee replacement. Is that covered usually?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Knee replacement is typically covered under most HDFC ERGO comprehensive plans, subject to your sum insured and waiting period clauses. I'd recommend checking your policy document or calling HDFC ERGO to confirm your specific coverage.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Right, right. And your insurance desk — when can I visit?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: The insurance desk is open Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 5 PM. You can also call ahead and we'll have someone ready to assist you.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Perfect. I'll come by this week. Thank you.
